question: The chart shows the percentage share for different product rating categories. Based on the percentages shown next to each point, which of the following statements is correct?

options.A: Support has a higher percentage share than Other.
options.B: Quality has the smallest percentage share among all categories.
options.C: Price and Design have nearly the same percentage share.
options.D: Other has the highest percentage share among all categories.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
